skill_recommendations.gap_recommendation: Build foundational understanding of transformer architecture and LLM fine-tuning. SMARRTIF AI offers hands-on LLM deployment workshops covering OpenAI, Anthropic, and open-source models.
skill_recommendations.course_suggestion: DeepLearning.AI – LLM Specialization (Coursera)

skill_recommendations.gap_recommendation: MLOps is critical for production ML — without it models never reach users. SMARRTIF AI's MLOps Accelerator covers model versioning, automated retraining pipelines, and production monitoring.
skill_recommendations.course_suggestion: Coursera – MLOps Specialization by DeepLearning.AI

skill_recommendations.gap_recommendation: Vector stores underpin modern RAG and semantic search systems. SMARRTIF AI's Vector DB Bootcamp covers Pinecone, Weaviate, pgvector, and integration patterns for LLM applications.
skill_recommendations.course_suggestion: Pinecone Learn – Vector Database Fundamentals (free)

skill_recommendations.gap_recommendation: dbt is the de-facto standard for analytics engineering. SMARRTIF AI's Modern Analytics Stack training covers dbt Core, dbt Cloud, testing best practices, and the analytics engineering workflow.
skill_recommendations.course_suggestion: dbt Learn – Fundamentals Course (official, free)

skill_recommendations.gap_recommendation: Snowflake proficiency is in high demand at data-driven companies. SMARRTIF AI offers a Snowflake Data Cloud Practitioner track covering performance optimisation, Cortex AI, and cost management.
skill_recommendations.course_suggestion: Snowflake University – Hands-On Essentials: Data Warehouse (free)

skill_recommendations.gap_recommendation: Container orchestration is essential for scalable production deployments. SMARRTIF AI's Cloud-Native Engineering Programme covers Kubernetes from basics to production-grade cluster management and CKAD preparation.
skill_recommendations.course_suggestion: Linux Foundation – Kubernetes and Cloud Native Essentials (LFS250)

skill_recommendations.gap_recommendation: Power BI is the leading enterprise BI tool. SMARRTIF AI's BI Mastery Programme offers end-to-end training including DAX, data modelling, row-level security, and enterprise report deployment.
skill_recommendations.course_suggestion: Microsoft Learn – Power BI learning path (PL-300 prep, free)

skill_recommendations.gap_recommendation: Effective prompting unlocks LLM potential across all technical roles. SMARRTIF AI's Prompt Engineering Practitioner course covers chain-of-thought, few-shot, role prompting, and agentic patterns.
skill_recommendations.course_suggestion: DeepLearning.AI – ChatGPT Prompt Engineering for Developers (free)

skill_recommendations.gap_recommendation: RAG is the dominant pattern for grounding LLMs with enterprise knowledge bases. SMARRTIF AI's GenAI Solutions Workshop walks through end-to-end RAG system design, evaluation, and production deployment.
skill_recommendations.course_suggestion: DeepLearning.AI – Building and Evaluating Advanced RAG Applications

skill_recommendations.gap_recommendation: Deep learning is foundational for advanced ML and AI engineering roles. SMARRTIF AI's AI Engineering Bootcamp covers CNNs, RNNs, transformers, and practical PyTorch/TensorFlow model building.
skill_recommendations.course_suggestion: fast.ai – Practical Deep Learning for Coders (free)

skill_recommendations.gap_recommendation: Spark is essential for processing data at scale beyond what fits in RAM. SMARRTIF AI's Big Data Engineering Programme covers Spark Core, Spark SQL, Structured Streaming, and PySpark on Databricks.
skill_recommendations.course_suggestion: Databricks Academy – Apache Spark Programming with Databricks

skill_recommendations.gap_recommendation: Tableau is a top-tier enterprise visualisation tool. SMARRTIF AI offers a Tableau for Business Intelligence course covering calculated fields, LOD expressions, dashboard storytelling, and Tableau Server.
skill_recommendations.course_suggestion: Tableau eLearning – Desktop I: Fundamentals (official)

skill_recommendations.gap_recommendation: Automated delivery pipelines are a baseline engineering expectation. SMARRTIF AI's DevOps Fundamentals track covers GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, Jenkins pipeline design, and deployment strategies.
skill_recommendations.course_suggestion: GitHub Skills – Introduction to GitHub Actions (free)

skill_recommendations.gap_recommendation: Containerisation is foundational for modern application development and ML model serving. SMARRTIF AI's Containers & Cloud workshop provides practical Docker and registry experience with Dockerfile best practices.
skill_recommendations.course_suggestion: Docker – Get Started official tutorials + Play With Docker labs (free)

skill_recommendations.gap_recommendation: Cloud fluency is expected across all technical roles. SMARRTIF AI's Cloud Practitioner Accelerator prepares candidates for major cloud certifications with guided hands-on labs and practice exams.
skill_recommendations.course_suggestion: AWS Skill Builder – Cloud Practitioner Essentials (free) or Google Cloud Skills Boost

skill_recommendations.gap_recommendation: Experimentation skills drive data-informed product decisions. SMARRTIF AI's Experimentation & Analytics course covers experimental design, statistical power, sequential testing, and avoiding common pitfalls.
skill_recommendations.course_suggestion: Udacity – A/B Testing by Google (free audit)

skill_recommendations.gap_recommendation: Reliable data pipelines are core infrastructure for any data role. SMARRTIF AI's Data Engineering Foundations course covers ETL vs ELT, Airflow orchestration, pipeline testing, and data quality monitoring.
skill_recommendations.course_suggestion: DataTalks.Club – Data Engineering Zoomcamp (free)

skill_recommendations.gap_recommendation: Statistics underpins data interpretation across all specialisations. SMARRTIF AI's Applied Statistics for Data Professionals covers hypothesis testing, regression analysis, Bayesian inference, and effect sizes.
skill_recommendations.course_suggestion: StatQuest with Josh Starmer (YouTube, free) or Khan Academy Statistics

skill_recommendations.gap_recommendation: Translating technical findings for non-technical audiences is essential for career progression. SMARRTIF AI's Business Communication for Analysts workshop focuses on executive reporting, data storytelling, and stakeholder influence.
skill_recommendations.course_suggestion: LinkedIn Learning – Communicating Data Findings to Stakeholders

skill_recommendations.gap_recommendation: System design is the key differentiator between mid-level and senior engineers. SMARRTIF AI's Engineering Excellence track includes distributed systems design, load balancing, caching strategies, and scalability patterns.
skill_recommendations.course_suggestion: ByteByteGo – System Design Interview (book + newsletter)

skill_recommendations.gap_recommendation: Process modelling ensures alignment between business goals and technical solutions. SMARRTIF AI offers a Business Analysis Foundations course covering BPMN 2.0, swim-lane diagrams, and process optimisation techniques.
skill_recommendations.course_suggestion: Coursera – Business Analytics Specialization (UPenn Wharton)

skill_recommendations.gap_recommendation: Agile fluency is expected in most product and technology organisations. SMARRTIF AI includes Agile fundamentals in its Professional Skills track, covering sprint ceremonies, user stories, backlog refinement, and retrospectives.
skill_recommendations.course_suggestion: Scrum.org – Scrum Guide (free) + Professional Scrum Master I (PSM I) prep

skill_recommendations.gap_recommendation: Feature engineering often has a larger impact on model performance than algorithm selection. SMARRTIF AI's ML Practitioner Workshop covers encoding strategies, interaction features, target encoding, and feature stores.
skill_recommendations.course_suggestion: Kaggle – Feature Engineering Course (free)

skill_recommendations.gap_recommendation: Robust data models are the foundation of scalable analytics. SMARRTIF AI's Data Architecture track covers dimensional modelling, star/snowflake schemas, data vault, and medallion architecture for lakehouses.
skill_recommendations.course_suggestion: DataTalks.Club – Data Engineering Zoomcamp – Data Modelling module (free)

skill_recommendations.gap_recommendation: TypeScript is now the default for serious JavaScript projects. SMARRTIF AI's Full-Stack Engineering Module covers TypeScript fundamentals, type narrowing, generics, and using it with modern frameworks.
skill_recommendations.course_suggestion: Total TypeScript – Beginner TypeScript (Matt Pocock, free)

skill_recommendations.gap_recommendation: Well-designed REST APIs are the backbone of distributed systems. SMARRTIF AI's Backend Engineering Workshop covers OpenAPI spec, versioning, authentication patterns, pagination, and error handling best practices.
skill_recommendations.course_suggestion: Postman – API Fundamentals Student Expert (free)

skill_recommendations.gap_recommendation: Version control is the baseline expectation for every technical role. SMARRTIF AI's Developer Foundations module covers branching strategies, rebasing, pull request workflows, and GitOps patterns.
skill_recommendations.course_suggestion: GitHub Skills – Introduction to GitHub (free)

skill_recommendations.gap_recommendation: Time series skills are in demand for finance, operations, and IoT roles. SMARRTIF AI's Applied Forecasting course covers ARIMA, Prophet, LSTM-based models, and evaluation with real-world datasets.
skill_recommendations.course_suggestion: Nixtla – TimeGPT tutorials + statsforecast library docs (free)

skill_recommendations.gap_recommendation: Computer vision is driving automation in manufacturing, retail, and healthcare. SMARRTIF AI's CV Engineering Bootcamp covers image preprocessing, CNN architectures, transfer learning, and deploying models with ONNX.
skill_recommendations.course_suggestion: fast.ai – Practical Deep Learning Part 1, Lessons 6–8 (free)

skill_recommendations.gap_recommendation: IaC is a DevOps and MLOps baseline for reproducible environments. SMARRTIF AI's Platform Engineering track covers Terraform, Pulumi, and cloud-provider CDKs for provisioning repeatable infrastructure.
skill_recommendations.course_suggestion: HashiCorp – Terraform Tutorials (free on developer.hashicorp.com)

skill_recommendations.gap_recommendation: NLP skills bridge the gap between raw text and structured ML inputs. SMARRTIF AI's NLP Practitioner Programme covers text preprocessing, named entity recognition, sentiment analysis, and fine-tuning transformer models.
skill_recommendations.course_suggestion: Hugging Face – NLP Course (free, official)

skill_recommendations.gap_recommendation: Linux fluency is required for cloud, data engineering, and MLOps workflows. SMARRTIF AI's Developer Foundations module covers shell scripting, cron jobs, file system navigation, process management, and SSH.
skill_recommendations.course_suggestion: Linux Foundation – Introduction to Linux (LFS101, free on edX)

low_score.message: Your CV shows significant skill gaps for this role. SMARRTIF AI offers a structured upskilling pathway tailored to your profile. Consider our Role Readiness Programme for a guided 3–6 month development plan.
low_score.cta: Book a free Skills Assessment Call with SMARRTIF AI

medium_score.message: You have a solid foundation but targeted upskilling could significantly boost your employability. SMARRTIF AI can help you close specific gaps with focused micro-courses and project-based learning.
medium_score.cta: Explore SMARRTIF AI's Targeted Skills Modules

high_score.message: Strong profile! To stand out further, consider advanced specialisations or certifications. SMARRTIF AI's Advanced Practitioner track can help you move into senior or lead roles.
high_score.cta: Join SMARRTIF AI's Advanced Practitioner Track
